workEmail: Enter a valid work email address.
passwordWeak: Use at least 10 characters with letters and numbers.
website: Enter a full URL starting with http:// or https://.
salaryRange: Maximum salary must be higher than the minimum.
singleChoiceOptions: Add at least two answer options.
fileType: Upload a PDF or DOCX file.
fileSize: File must be 5 MB or smaller.
